welcome.subtitle: We'll help you split every payment between needs and debt repayment.
welcome.privacy: Your data stays only on your phone. We don't send anything.

typeHints.payday_loan: Provident, Wonga, Vivus etc. — short-term loan with high interest.
typeHints.credit: Bank loan with fixed monthly installments, e.g. cash loan, consolidation.
typeHints.credit_card: Credit card with revolving limit. Minimum payment is % of balance.
typeHints.installment: Buy-now-pay-later — store installments, PayPo, Klarna. Often 0%.
typeHints.other: Loan from a friend, family, employer or other informal arrangement.

ready.title: Ready!
ready.commitment: When I receive money — I open GigMoney first.

snowball.noDebts: You have no active debts. Great work!

deferred.pending_one: You have {{count}} deferred payment to catch up on
deferred.pending_other: You have {{count}} deferred payments to catch up on

new.title: New income
new.subtitle: How much did you receive? We'll split it together.

allocate.title: Distribution
allocate.defaultBiasNote: The split is calculated optimally. You can confirm it with one tap.

shortfall.title: Insufficient funds
shortfall.lossWarning: You will lose {{amount}} {{currency}} on uncovered essential expenses. Consider deferring a payment.
shortfall.advice: You can confirm the allocation and decide which payments to defer.

confirm.title: Summary
confirm.subtitle: Review the allocation and save when everything looks right.
confirm.saveNote: After saving, your income history will be updated.

list.title: Debts
list.empty: You don't have any debts yet.

form.label: Name
form.remainingAmountHint: Loan: remaining principal. Card: balance to repay.
form.minimumPaymentHint: Loan: installment amount. Card: minimum payment due.
form.interestRateHint: Annual rate from your contract, not APR. For PayPo/BNPL enter 0.
form.overdueAmountHint: Overdue payment amount from your bank, if any.

debts.validationRemainingAmount: Enter an amount greater than 0 PLN.

edit.title: Edit debt
edit.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this debt? This action cannot be undone.
edit.closedBadgeLabel: This debt is already closed and cannot be edited.

progress.title: Progress
progress.noDebts: You have no debts. Great work!

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
